query:
SELECT name, 
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '%<table%' THEN 'HAS TABLE' ELSE 'no table' END as has_table,
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '%<pre%' THEN 'HAS PRE' ELSE 'no pre' END as has_pre,
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '%style=%' THEN 'HAS INLINE STYLE' ELSE 'no style' END as has_style,
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '%width:%' THEN 'HAS WIDTH' ELSE 'no width' END as has_width
FROM suppliers WHERE name LIKE '%Gold Medal%' OR name LIKE '%Celebrity%' OR name LIKE '%Royal Caribbean%';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4PycK9Y631tLhJa.0110aa12e67a --database PdcDVQRp8zC2FzsyWBWptW --execute 
SELECT name, 
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '%<table%' THEN 'HAS TABLE' ELSE 'no table' END as has_table,
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '%<pre%' THEN 'HAS PRE' ELSE 'no pre' END as has_pre,
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '%style=%' THEN 'HAS INLINE STYLE' ELSE 'no style' END as has_style,
  CASE WHEN description LIKE '%width:%' THEN 'HAS WIDTH' ELSE 'no width' END as has_width
FROM suppliers WHERE name LIKE '%Gold Medal%' OR name LIKE '%Celebrity%' OR name LIKE '%Royal Caribbean%';
stdout:
name	has_table	has_pre	has_style	has_width
Gold Medal	no table	no pre	no style	no width
Royal Caribbean | Celebrity Cruises	no table	no pre	no style	no width
Celebrity + Royal Caribbean Cruises	no table	no pre	no style	no width
